suite.name: Amazon

test.name: User must sign in to check out

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for internet explorer; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.status: NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for internet explorer; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location

kw.name: Set Window Position
kw.doc: Sets window position using ``x`` and ``y`` coordinates.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: This is some basic info about the test
test.status: NoSuchDriverException: Message: Unable to obtain driver for internet explorer; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location

suite.doc: This is some basic info about the whole suite
